entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the crop studied for seed yield and genotype-environment interactions

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced, used as the primary performance measure

entities.name: GENOTYPE-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors affecting seed yield

entities.name: RESIDUAL MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD PROCEDURE
entities.description: A statistical procedure used to analyze seed yield data

entities.name: PATTERN ANALYSIS
entities.description: Methods of classification and ordination used to understand the structure of genotype x environment interactions

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: One of the two major types of chickpea

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: One of the two major types of chickpea, often associated with bold seeds

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: A main area for chickpea adaptation

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN REGION
entities.description: A main area for chickpea adaptation

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A method used to reduce the GL mean data matrix into groups

entities.name: MEGA-ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Large-scale environmental regions identified through location grouping

entities.name: TROPICAL
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by latitudes less than 23 degrees

entities.name: SUB-TROPICAL
entities.description: Environmental condition distinct from tropical regions

entities.name: GIZA
entities.description: A low yielding chickpea genotype

entities.name: HARIGANTARS
entities.description: A low yielding chickpea genotype

entities.name: K 850
entities.description: A medium-duration chickpea genotype from India

entities.name: L 550
entities.description: A medium-duration chickpea genotype from India

entities.name: ICCC 8
entities.description: A medium-duration chickpea genotype from India

entities.name: ICCC 4
entities.description: A medium-duration chickpea genotype from India

entities.name: RABAT
entities.description: A chickpea genotype from Morocco

entities.name: MOROCCO
entities.description: Country in the Mediterranean region

entities.name: ILC 482
entities.description: A chickpea genotype from Turkey

entities.name: TURKEY
entities.description: Country in the Mediterranean region

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT BIPLOT
entities.description: A visualization method used to analyze genotype-environment interactions

entities.description: A physical characteristic of the seed, specifically associated with the kabuli type
